infiniteConstraints2.tlua(5,17): error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
infiniteConstraints2.tlua(5,48): error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
infiniteConstraints2.tlua(11,8): error TLUA2589: Type instantiation is excessively deep and possibly infinite.


==== infiniteConstraints2.tlua (3 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/issues/63269
    
    type Prepend<Elm, T extends unknown[]> =
     T extends unknown ?
     ((arg: Elm, ...rest: T) => void) extends ((...args: infer T2) => void) ? T2 : 
                    ~~~~
!!! error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
                                                   ~~~~
!!! error TLUA100034: A vararg parameter cannot have a name.
     never :
     never;
    type ExactExtract<T, U> = (T extends U ? U extends T ? T : never : never) & string;
    type Conv<T, U = T> = {
        0: [T];
        1: Prepend<T, Conv<ExactExtract<U, T>, {a: number}>>;
           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2589: Type instantiation is excessively deep and possibly infinite.
    }[U extends T ? 0 : 1];
